name: screen-layout
description: Reusable screen layout with sticky header, back button, and responsive padding.

props.name: children
props.description: Main content rendered inside the scrollable area.

props.name: title
props.description: Title text displayed in the header.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Optional subtitle displayed below the header inside the scroll area.

props.name: showBackButton
props.description: When true and onBack is provided, renders a back button in the header.

props.name: onBack
props.description: Callback fired when the back button is pressed. If omitted the back button is hidden.

props.name: showThemeToggle
props.description: When true, renders a theme toggle button on the right side of the header.

props.name: rightActions
props.description: Up to 2 extra action buttons rendered on the right side of the header.

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: When true the header stays fixed above the scroll area; when false it scrolls with content.
